allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); streams=d.get\('streams',[]\); print\(json.dumps\(streams[0] if streams else {}, indent=2\)\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('cached:', d.get\('cached'\)\); markers=d.get\('markers',[]\); print\(f'{len\(markers\)} markers found'\); [print\(f'  [{m[\\"type\\"]:10}] {m[\\"ts\\"]:>6}s — {m[\\"label\\"]}'\) for m in markers[:15]]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('cached:', d.get\('cached'\), '| markers:', len\(d.get\('markers', []\)\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('Server up —', len\(d\), 'channels loaded'\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('Server up —', len\(d\), 'channels'\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('stream-log OK — days in log:', len\(d\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('pending-analysis OK —', len\(d\), 'items queued'\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('server up' if d else 'empty'\)")
